Your Custom Solution

One command center.
Every brand. Zero chaos.

Here is what my team can build for you. Based on your three pain points, here is exactly how we would solve each one and what it means for your day to day.

Three problems. Three solutions.
01
Sales Follow-Up and Closing
  • Automated follow-up sequences via SMS and email, triggered the moment a lead comes in
  • Pulls context from your notes, screenshots, and Zoom recordings to personalize every message
  • Approval panel so you review and push, or set it fully automated and let it run
  • Built-in meeting requests and task triggers to keep every deal moving forward
02
CRM Across Multiple Brands
  • One custom dashboard with a dedicated panel for each brand you manage: CannaJo!nt, GoPlay, Sports Cannabis, Estate-Minder, and more
  • Fully segmented so no leads or contacts ever mix between clients
  • Central task and follow-up hub with a live view of everything happening across all brands at once
  • Works on phone, tablet, or laptop and syncs everywhere with no installs required
03
Social Volume and Consistency
  • AI-generated content batching for every brand so you can generate a week of posts in minutes
  • Automated scheduling so content goes live on your timeline, not your to-do list
  • Brand profiles built in so tone, industry, and voice stay consistent across every client account
  • Connected directly inside your dashboard with no separate logins needed
Bonus
+
Around the Clock Bail Bonds
  • Automated lead response the moment someone fills out a form, day or night, with a personalized SMS or email so no lead goes cold
  • AI-powered phone agent that calls the lead, qualifies them with smart questions, and if they meet the right criteria, transfers them live directly to your boyfriend right then and there
  • Local SEO content strategy to drive organic search traffic in Greensboro and Winston-Salem
  • Reddit, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts strategy to build brand presence where Google ads are not allowed
  • Managed right alongside everything else inside the same dashboard
Your tech stack simplified

Integrates With

  • Mailchimp
  • Wix
  • Kajabi

Eliminates Need For

Next steps
Here is how we move forward
  1. See it before we build it. My team can put together a front-end dashboard mockup so you can visualize exactly what your command center would look like and how it would work across your brands. No smoke and mirrors, just a real interactive preview.
  2. Talk numbers. Once you have seen the vision, we sit down and discuss pricing. Everything is scoped to your actual needs so you are only paying for what makes sense for where you are right now.
  3. Ask me anything. Have questions about how any of this works, what tools are involved, or how long it takes to build? Fire away. The more I know about your situation the better I can dial this in for you.
  4. We build it. You give the green light and my team gets to work. From there you get a fully operational system, not a deck, not a strategy doc, something that actually runs your business in the background while you focus on growth.
Ready to break through?
